title: distephanus glandulicinctus
intro: Distephanus glandulicinctus, also known as African lavender, is a shrub-like plant native to tropical Africa. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Distephanus glandulicinctus include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce stress and anxiety, and treat wounds and infections. The plant is typically prepared as a tea, essential oil, or infusion, and can be used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
